channel.title: NVIDIA H200 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in NVIDIA H200 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Red Hat OpenShift adds NVIDIA H100 and H200 GPU support
item.description:
Azure Red Hat OpenShift (ARO) now supports NVIDIA H100 and H200 GPU-based Azure VM SKUs. The update targets large-scale AI, machine learning, and HPC workloads on the managed OpenShift service.

  • Source: Azure Updates
